vizieye.problem: Smart India Hackathon teams needed to explore datasets, build charts, and present insights under tight deadlines — without wrestling with fragmented tools or slow iteration cycles.
vizieye.solution: Led development of Vizieye, a Python data visualization platform focused on speed, clarity, and team collaboration. Built for SIH & H.T.M. 5.0 with a workflow tuned for rapid exploration and demo-ready outputs.
vizieye.impact: Team Lead on a hackathon-winning platform — pitched and demoed to national jury panels under competition pressure.

lakehouse.problem: Enterprise analytics teams needed governed, scalable pipelines that bridge raw ingestion with trusted analytics — without siloed data or brittle ETL.
lakehouse.solution: Design and build production lakehouse pipelines at R Systems using Databricks, Delta Live Tables, Unity Catalog, and Snowflake integration patterns for enterprise clients.
lakehouse.impact: Delivering production-grade lakehouse architecture with governance-first data modeling — current role focus since Oct 2025.
